title: Create LocalSend transfer path
goal: Set up a low-friction local transfer path between heim-pc, iPad and Samsung A54 for screenshots, PDFs, diffs and logs without cloud detours.

acceptance.assertion: A local inbox path such as /home/alex/Incoming/LocalSend is defined.
At least one transfer direction is smoke-tested or blocked with device-side missing prerequisite recorded.
LocalSend does not become an archival or authority layer; received files are triaged into the appropriate repo/document/archive path.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
validation: LocalSend Flatpak remains installed with ~/Incoming/LocalSend and paperless-consume handoff prepared.
LocalSend remote transfer was not accepted: the Flatpak GUI did not expose a working LocalSend API/port from the tested operator context.
User chose Taildrop as replacement remote device-transfer path.
User executed sudo tailscale set --operator=alex locally on heim-pc.
tailscale file get --verbose --conflict=rename ~/Incoming/Taildrop returned moved 0/0 files with rc 0 as alex after operator setup.
heim-taildrop-inbox.service is enabled and active as a systemd user service.
PC-to-iPad tailscale file cp probe returned rc 0.
iPad-to-PC Taildrop transfer delivered gg.md into ~/Incoming/Taildrop at 2026-07-09T19:13:59+02:00.
A repeat iPad-to-PC transfer delivered gg (1).md into ~/Incoming/Taildrop at 2026-07-09T19:14:34+02:00.
Both received proof files are 4 bytes and have SHA-256 9f86d081884c7d659a2feaa0c55ad015a3bf4f1b2b0b822cd15d6c15b0f00a08.
metadata.runtime_evidence: heimgewebe/infra runtime/local-utility-endstate-2026-07-09.md and heimgewebe/heim-pc runtime/software-inventory.md after Taildrop transfer closeout

acceptance_override.reason: The user accepted Taildrop after LocalSend remote transfer timed out and LocalSend did not expose a working receiver port from the tested PC context.

verification.source_ref: heimgewebe/infra runtime/local-utility-endstate-2026-07-09.md and heimgewebe/heim-pc runtime/software-inventory.md after Taildrop transfer closeout
